name: MSSP - OS - MS - 13 - M - Group type changed
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4764
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Group Name (custom) in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Group Name (custom) in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - OS - MS - 13 - M - Group type changed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 4764
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Group Name (custom) in 10 minutes
